creator: ebyelyakov@outlook.com
text:
Hi Johan

Luckily for me, the problem was fixed once and for all with this kern.vty="sc" that on a surface (for an non-developer like myself) had nothing to do with the ACPI. Full multi-user right away with the system back at its operation right away.

Hope someone more familiar with the FreeBSD code picks it up to do a proper investigation. This was the weirdest issue I've ever experienced with FreeBSD I've been using since the late 90's
